title: Oceanic Survival
description: A single island surrounded by endless seas.
body:
Stranded on an island with no other land in sight, you must find some way to survive in a vast ocean filled with pirates, sunken ruins, and restless undead. 

Wheither your focus is on expanding the limited dry land you have, exploring the sea with a navy's worth of ships, or desperately trying to keep your villagers from swimming into a sea-monster's mouth, there's something here for you!
